steps.expected: Article detail page renders glossary tooltip links in body
steps.observed: Article page loaded and annotated screenshot shows glossary-linked terms (algorithm, variable, object, array).

steps.action: Audit DOM tooltip wrapping and attributes
steps.expected: Tooltip anchors use class tooltip, title includes 'term - definition (<=75 chars)', and href links to /glossary/term/{term}
steps.observed: DOM audit found 4 tooltip anchors with correct href targets and title definitions at or below 75 chars (max observed: 75).

steps.action: Check repeat wrapping behavior for repeated terms
steps.expected: Only first occurrence wrapped; later occurrences unwrapped
steps.observed: For repeated terms ('algorithm', 'array'), first occurrence was wrapped and later occurrences were unwrapped.

steps.expected: Endpoint reachable for supporting network evidence
steps.observed: GET /api/articles/introduction-to-algorithms returned HTTP 200 with article payload.

steps.expected: Client-rendered not-found page; hidden content not shown
steps.observed: Not-found UI rendered, and hidden article title/body were not present.

steps.expected: API returns 404 for hidden article slug
steps.observed: GET /api/articles/draft-hidden-article returned HTTP 404 with {"error":"Article not found"}.

steps.action: Check homepage, search results, and category listings
steps.expected: Hidden article excluded from public listings/search/category pages
steps.observed: Hidden title/slug absent on homepage, absent in search UI (no-results page), and absent from category listing page (/categories/php).

steps.expected: Hidden article absent from popular, recent, search, and category listing APIs
steps.observed: Exclusion summary confirmed hidden slug/title absent from /api/articles/popular, /api/articles/recent, /api/categories/* listings, and hidden-term search response.

frictions.description: Placeholder-based locator for sidebar search field intermittently failed on homepage.
frictions.resolution: Switched to stable element refs from snapshot (@e31 searchbox, @e32 button).

summary: Retested 2 assertions (VAL-DETAIL-008, VAL-DETAIL-010): both passed with UI screenshots, DOM audits, and curl API evidence.
